title: Food Commercial Poster AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Macro tilt-shift miniature winter food landscape built around giant Nutella jar with readable label and thick glossy chocolate hazelnut spread, thick chocolate hazelnut spread flowing out into a glossy mountain ski slope dusted with light snow powder, and tiny skiers carving down the chocolate hill and riding small gondolas up the edible slope. Subject: giant Nutella jar with readable label and thick glossy chocolate hazelnut spread is the readable hero product at giant scale, with tactile edible surface detail, appetizing gloss, and clear jar silhouette. Scene: miniature alpine village with wooden cabins, pine trees, ski lift gondolas, snowy forest, and distant mountains surrounds the hero product as a miniature alpine resort, supporting the food fantasy without overpowering the product. Composition: thick chocolate hazelnut spread flowing out into a glossy mountain ski slope dusted with light snow powder forms the central edible ski terrain; fixed 4:5 commercial crop with giant jar in the upper hero position, flowing spread as the slope, tiny figures for scale, and strong tilt-shift depth. Signature Elements: tiny skiers carving down the chocolate hill and riding small gondolas up the edible slope interact with the edible slope through skiing, snowboarding, lift riding, and tiny resort activity so the image reads as a playful commercial food world. Style: Ultra-realistic macro food advertising with fantasy miniature set design, tilt-shift photography, polished commercial detail, tactile chocolate or caramel texture, snowy powder contrast, and premium social-media finish. Color Palette: Fixed warm chocolate or caramel browns, clean snowy whites, alpine wood tones, evergreen pine accents, soft blue mountain haze, and appetizing glossy highlights. Lighting: Soft winter daylight with clean highlights on the jar, glossy spread, snow powder, miniature figures, wooden cabins, and distant mountains. Camera: Macro lens with tilt-shift effect, shallow depth of field, readable foreground product scale, and crisp miniature details near the hero slope. Restrictions: Keep the product jar readable, preserve realistic edible texture, keep miniature people coherent, maintain clean composition, and use only intentional product-label text.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Food Commercial Poster Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Macro tilt-shift miniature winter food landscape built around oversized caramel cream jar with a clean invented alpine label and glossy caramel spread, caramel ribbon pouring into a smooth snowboard halfpipe dusted with sugar frost, and tiny snowboarders, lift workers, and cafe visitors moving through the edible resort. Subject: oversized caramel cream jar with a clean invented alpine label and glossy caramel spread is the readable hero product at giant scale, with tactile edible surface detail, appetizing gloss, and clear jar silhouette. Scene: toy-scale mountain lodge, frosted fir trees, cable cars, snowy cafe terrace, and hazy blue peaks surrounds the hero product as a miniature alpine resort, supporting the food fantasy without overpowering the product. Composition: caramel ribbon pouring into a smooth snowboard halfpipe dusted with sugar frost forms the central edible ski terrain; fixed 4:5 commercial crop with giant jar in the upper hero position, flowing spread as the slope, tiny figures for scale, and strong tilt-shift depth. Signature Elements: tiny snowboarders, lift workers, and cafe visitors moving through the edible resort interact with the edible slope through skiing, snowboarding, lift riding, and tiny resort activity so the image reads as a playful commercial food world. Style: Ultra-realistic macro food advertising with fantasy miniature set design, tilt-shift photography, polished commercial detail, tactile chocolate or caramel texture, snowy powder contrast, and premium social-media finish. Color Palette: Fixed warm chocolate or caramel browns, clean snowy whites, alpine wood tones, evergreen pine accents, soft blue mountain haze, and appetizing glossy highlights. Lighting: Soft winter daylight with clean highlights on the jar, glossy spread, snow powder, miniature figures, wooden cabins, and distant mountains. Camera: Macro lens with tilt-shift effect, shallow depth of field, readable foreground product scale, and crisp miniature details near the hero slope. Restrictions: Keep the product jar readable, preserve realistic edible texture, keep miniature people coherent, maintain clean composition, and use only intentional product-label text.
